panel.title: Settings
panel.description: Configure rondoflow preferences. Changes are saved automatically.

cautious.label: Cautious
cautious.description: Approve every tool call. Best for sensitive environments.

balanced.label: Balanced
balanced.description: Approve risky operations; allow safe ones automatically.

autonomous.label: Autonomous
autonomous.description: Agents act without approval. Use with trusted workflows only.

agentTeams.label: Agent Teams
agentTeams.description: Allow agents to spawn sub-agents and coordinate as a team.
agentTeams.warning: Agent teams significantly increase token usage and cost per session.

maxBudget.label: Max Budget per Session ($)
maxBudget.description: Global spend cap forwarded to every run. A run stops with a budget error when it exceeds this amount. Leave empty for no limit.

directorBudget.label: Director Budget per Evaluation ($)
directorBudget.description: Spend cap for each Director evaluation between workflow steps. Raise it for long workflows with large step histories that hit a budget error. Leave empty for the default.

directorTimeout.label: Director Timeout per Evaluation (s)
directorTimeout.description: Wall-clock limit for each Director evaluation between workflow steps. On timeout the step's output is passed on unreviewed. Raise it for long workflows that hit a timeout error. Leave empty for the default.

editConfirm.warning: Edit mode lets this agent modify files.

defaultLevel.title: Default Safety Level
defaultLevel.description: Applies to all assistants unless overridden.

blocked.title: Blocked Commands
blocked.description: These commands are always blocked, regardless of safety level.

approval.title: Require Approval
approval.description: These commands require your approval before running.

context.title: Workspace Context
context.description: This document is injected into every agent prompt in this workspace. Use it for shared instructions, project context, or coding standards.
context.placeholder:
# Workspace Context

Describe the project, conventions, or instructions that all agents should follow...

workingDir.title: Working Directory
workingDir.description: Set the directory where agents and git operations run. Leave empty to use the server's default directory.

plan.title: Workspace Plan
plan.description: Define goals, milestones, and tasks for this workspace. This document is for your reference — it is not injected into agent prompts.
plan.placeholder:
# Workspace Plan

Define goals, milestones, and tasks for this workspace...

credentials.intro: Stored encrypted on the server. Secrets are never displayed — only a masked preview.

input.keepCurrent: Leave blank to keep current value

anthropic.title: Claude access
anthropic.hint: Agents run via the Claude Code CLI. Provide either an API key, or a setup token from `claude setup-token` (uses your Claude subscription). If both are set, the setup token wins. Applies immediately on save.

openai.title: OpenAI access
openai.hint: Used by OpenAI assistants. Create a key at platform.openai.com/api-keys. Applies immediately on save.

perplexity.title: Perplexity access
perplexity.hint: Used by Perplexity assistants. Create a key at perplexity.ai/settings/api. Applies immediately on save.

github.title: GitHub OAuth
github.hint: Enables “Sign in with GitHub”. Create an OAuth app in GitHub → Developer settings.

google.title: Google OAuth
google.hint: Enables “Sign in with Google”. Create OAuth credentials in the Google Cloud console.

smtp.title: Email (SMTP)
smtp.hint: Used by the canvas Email node to send workflow output. SMTP secure: "true" for port 465 (implicit TLS), "false" for 587 (STARTTLS). Applies immediately on save; leave SMTP host empty to disable.
